text_block_list.text: Finally, it's time for Fuji Kiseki's debut race.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
"Here's Fuji Kiseki! She's already made quite a
name for herself before her debut. Rumor has it
she had a whole crowd of trainers vying to work
with her."

text_block_list.name: Announcer B
text_block_list.text:
"That must mean her current trainer is the cream
of the crop!"

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
"That may be so! Now, I don't know about you,
but I can't wait to see how they do today!"

Even though this is Fuji Kiseki's race, a great deal
of attention is suddenly turned on me too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Let me cast a charm on you real quick, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's a special spell that will fill you with courage.
Give me your hand.

I hold out my right hand as asked, and she takes
it between both of hers.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I know you well. You're brave and wise and warm.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
When I release your hand, your heart will brim
with courage. When you look up, you'll see a
rainbow.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm going to let go now.
She releases her grip on me slowly.

I feel something resting in my palm, and when I
check, I realize it's a piece of wrapped chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Chocolate is supposed to settle the nerves. Think
of it as a bonus.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'd better go now. I'll see you later.
Fuji Kiseki exits the room with a gallant flourish.

My right hand is warm and the chocolate is sweet.
Next thing I know, I'm no longer nervous at all.
